tender_metadata.tender_name: string — full name/title of the tender
tender_metadata.issuing_authority: string — organisation issuing the tender (e.g. CRPF, DG CRPF)
tender_metadata.procurement_category: string — category of goods/services being procured
tender_metadata.tender_type: string — one of: Open, Limited, Single, GEM, RFP, RFQ, EOI
tender_metadata.bid_validity_days: integer — number of days bid remains valid, or null
tender_metadata.estimated_contract_value_paise: integer — estimated value in paise (1 crore = 10000000000 paise), or null
tender_metadata.contract_duration: string — e.g. '24 months', '2 years', or null
tender_metadata.evaluation_method: string — L1, QCBS, Merit, or null
tender_metadata.source_pages: array of integers — pages where core metadata was found

criteria.criterion_id: string — sequential ID like CRIT_001, CRIT_002
criteria.criterion_type: string — one of: financial_threshold | technical_experience | similar_work | certification | compliance | document_required | personnel | net_worth | turnover | infrastructure | joint_venture | other
criteria.description: string — plain-English description of what the bidder must satisfy
criteria.comparison_op: string — one of: gte | lte | equals | exists | count_gte | count_lte | range | not_null
criteria.threshold_value: number or null — the numeric threshold in normalised units (see threshold_unit)
criteria.threshold_unit: string or null — one of: INR_paise | INR_crore | INR_lakh | years | count | boolean | percentage | null
criteria.threshold_period: string or null — reference period for the criterion, e.g. 'last_3_financial_years', 'last_5_years', 'last_7_years', null
criteria.threshold_count: integer or null — minimum number of occurrences required (e.g. 2 out of last 3 years)
criteria.accepted_docs: array of strings — document names that serve as valid evidence, e.g. ['Audited Balance Sheet', 'CA Certificate', 'Form 26AS']
criteria.source_page: integer — exact page in tender PDF where this criterion appears
criteria.source_quote: string — VERBATIM text from the tender clause, word-for-word as it appears in the PDF
criteria.ambiguity_flag: boolean — true if the criterion language is ambiguous or could be interpreted multiple ways
criteria.ambiguity_note: string or null — explanation of the ambiguity if ambiguity_flag is true

document_checklist.doc_type: string — e.g. 'GST Registration Certificate', 'ISO 9001 Certificate', 'Audited Balance Sheet'
document_checklist.issuing_authority: string or null — e.g. 'GST Department', 'BIS', 'MSME Ministry'
document_checklist.validity_required: string or null — e.g. 'Valid as on date of submission', 'Not older than 3 years'
document_checklist.criterion_ids: array of strings — which criteria this document satisfies

self_audit.quality_score: integer 0-100 — overall quality of the tender document's drafting

issues.issue_type: string — one of: contradiction | ambiguous_date_reference | over_restrictive_combination | missing_doc_specification | conflicting_threshold | unclear_evaluation_method | incomplete_criteria | other
issues.severity: string — one of: Critical | High | Medium | Low
issues.description: string — clear explanation of the issue
issues.affected_criterion_ids: array of strings — criterion IDs involved in this issue
issues.clause_a_page: integer or null — page of first conflicting clause
issues.clause_a_quote: string or null — VERBATIM quote of first conflicting clause
issues.clause_b_page: integer or null — page of second conflicting clause (if contradiction)
issues.clause_b_quote: string or null — VERBATIM quote of second conflicting clause (if contradiction)
issues.recommendation: string — suggested corrective action or clarification needed

market_benchmark_flags.criterion_id: string — which financial criterion this flag relates to
market_benchmark_flags.threshold_description: string — e.g. 'Minimum annual turnover INR 12 crore'
market_benchmark_flags.flag_reason: string — why this threshold may be unusual (e.g. unusually high, no precedent)
market_benchmark_flags.severity: string — one of: High | Medium | Low

summary.executive_summary: string — 3-5 sentences describing what this tender procures and the key eligibility requirements
summary.estimated_minimum_turnover_crore: number or null — the single highest minimum turnover threshold found, in crore INR
summary.experience_years_required: integer or null — maximum years of experience required across all criteria
